summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SiteNavbar label change (Tips → Blog & Tips) and BlogListPage mobile-first redesign. All 28 test assertions PASSED. Verified: Desktop More dropdown shows 'Blog & Tips', Mobile More menu shows 'Blog & Tips', CTA section navy bg (#0D1B2A) with 3px #FF5722 borderTop, Mobile sticky bar navyMid (#1A2F45) with CALL (orange), BOOK (navy + Same-Day label), TEXT (transparent + 2px border). All custom CSS grid classes (blog-grid, trust-grid, blog-filter-bar) working correctly - NO Tailwind grid. Float button and CTA buttons have NO onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave handlers.
critical_code_review_comments: SiteNavbar.jsx lines 383 and 719 correctly show 'Blog & Tips' for /blog link in both desktop More dropdown and mobile More menu
BlogListPage.js CTA section (line 353): background '#0D1B2A' (navy) with borderTop '3px solid #FF5722' - NOT orange bg anymore
BlogListPage.js Mobile sticky bar (line 381): background '#1A2F45' (navyMid) with borderTop '2px solid #FF5722'
BlogListPage.js BOOK button (line 383): background '#0D1B2A' (navy) with border '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' and Same-Day label
BlogListPage.js TEXT button (line 387): background 'transparent' with border '2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15)'
BlogListPage.js Float button (line 374): NO onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave - correct
BlogListPage.js CTA BOOK btn (line 359): NO onMouseEnter - correct
CSS .blog-grid uses custom CSS grid (1fr → 2col → 3col) NOT Tailwind grid classes
CSS .trust-grid uses custom CSS grid (1fr → 2col → 3col) NOT Tailwind grid classes
CSS .blog-filter-bar has horizontal scroll on mobile (nowrap, overflow-x:auto), wraps on desktop
context_for_next_testing_agent: BlogListPage mobile-first redesign verified. Test URL: /blog. Mobile tests at 390px viewport. All responsive font sizes verified: H1 28px/46px, section-h2 24px/32px, feat-h2 20px/26px, card img 180px/200px. Mobile sticky bar has 3 buttons: CALL (orange), BOOK (navy + Same-Day), TEXT (transparent + 2px border).
